strategic.description: Real-time control parameters for advanced caching layer optimization, automated legal compliance alerts, and HashiCorp Vault key transit.
strategic.under_ms: Under 1ms Hot Cache (Redis) Fallback to SSD (Garage S3)
strategic.persistence_comment: * Waveform signatures persist in Garage S3 backend with dynamic falling buffers.
strategic.predictive_desc: Exemption certificate monitoring 14 days before expiration
strategic.zz_regulation_comment: In license monitoring compliance protocols, automatic escalations are triggered at 14, 7, 3, and 0 days matching OZZ regulations.
strategic.no_licenses_warning: No active licenses are currently within the 14-day expiry threshold.
strategic.escalation_footer: Escalation sweeps auto-disconnect playbacks instantly upon expiry index 0.
strategic.hsm_desc: High security transit signing engines in place of traditional physical HSM wrappers

whitelabel.pin_description: Enter the 4-digit location PIN to access this white-label stream.
whitelabel.stream_description: You are listening to the official radio network of {{brandName}}. Curated premium sounds for our guests.
whitelabel.offline_error: No internet connection. Please connect and try again.

paymentPortal.heading: Unified Billing & Payment Hub
paymentPortal.desc: Acquire multi-jurisdiction exemptions (ZAiKS/STOART) instantly. All subscriptions and payments are secured via modern JWT endpoints paired with standard Stripe & PayU handlers.
paymentPortal.starterDesc: Ideal for small coffee shops or local boutiques under 50 sqm.
paymentPortal.premiumDesc: Excellent for mid-size networks, restaurants, and hotels.
paymentPortal.redirectDesc: You will be redirected to our encrypted sandbox overlay to authenticate.
paymentPortal.infoText: For Polish markets, payments processed under either Stripe or PayU trigger instantaneous ZAiKS & STOART audit clearance seals.
paymentPortal.refundConfirm: Are you sure you want to trigger a refund? For linked licenses, this will revoke the active STOART/ZAiKS certification instantly.

trackLibrary.heading: Track Library
trackLibrary.subheading: Browse, preview and manage audio tracks

licensingManager.companyNamePlaceholder: e.g. Kawiarnia Aromatyczna Sp. z o.o.
licensingManager.warningText: This certificate guarantees that regional royalty collection agents (ZAiKS/STOART) cannot inspect, fine, or demand royalties for background music broadcasts when this layout is active in outlets.
licensingManager.emptyDesc: Select an outlet's active license from the library, or issue a new exemption certificate.
licensingManager.renewPrompt: How many additional days would you like to add?
licensingManager.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this license? This will invalidate the STOART/ZAiKS/ZPAV exemption certificate instantly.

outletManager.addLocationHint: Add a location to your company to get started.
outletManager.heading: Multi-Location Outlet Manager

wordPressSync.heading: WordPress Headless CMS Integration
wordPressSync.description: Automate live track metadata updates, publishing license exemptions, and receiving bidirectional updates for custom post types and landing page contents.
wordPressSync.bidirectionalDesc: Allow ingestion from WordPress and automatic exports of metrics.
wordPressSync.webhookDesc: WordPress sends outbound HTTP notifications on event streams. Simulate an automated webhook payload to test local database ingestion immediately.
wordPressSync.emptyLedger: No synchronization logs recorded yet. Click 'Trigger Manual Sync' above to start content mapping.

notificationsHub.loadLogsError: Failed to load notification audit trails
notificationsHub.configSaved: Config settings and mail templates saved successfully!
notificationsHub.heading: Phase 8: Email Notifications & Alert Hub
notificationsHub.subtitle: Configure SMTP / SendGrid Providers & Broadcast Real-Time WS Messages to Connected Venues
notificationsHub.mailGatewayDesc: Choose the standard server communication protocols
notificationsHub.sendgridApiKeyHint: API request will be executed to sendgrid endpoints via Bearer token authorization header.
notificationsHub.sandboxDesc: Test template parsing & dispatch loops instantaneously
notificationsHub.sandboxProtectionDesc: If the SMTP host is left as default (mailtrap.io and licensing_notifications_user config), emails are captured in sandbox mode. This mimics full transmission and saves log entries to the ledger database without crashing.
notificationsHub.scenarioLicenseExpDesc: Alert threshold warnings prior to lapse
notificationsHub.editTemplateDesc: Edit custom subject headings and full body texts
notificationsHub.varNameDesc: Recipient full user name / company outlet lead contacts name
notificationsHub.varCertNumberDesc: Exemption license target certificate index string
notificationsHub.varCurrencyDesc: ISO currency key utilized during payments (e.g. PLN, EUR, USD)
notificationsHub.wsDispatcherDesc: Transmit structural popup payloads directly to connected venues
notificationsHub.detailBodyPlaceholder: Attention: background streams will momentarily re-negotiate TLS on 3:00 AM UTC...
notificationsHub.broadcastSuccessDesc: Pushed payload to connected sockets. Synced with client nodes.
notificationsHub.activeBroadcastDesc: When dispatched, this triggers a real-time event that reaches client terminals and triggers floating toast notifications, reflecting real-time system changes immediately.
notificationsHub.ledgerDesc: Chronological record of emails and broadcast logs
notificationsHub.emptyLogs: No notification dispatches have been recorded yet.
notificationsHub.emptyLogsHint: Configure your SMTP settings to start tracking mail and socket broadcasts.

reportingStudio.heading: Analytics & Reports Studio
reportingStudio.description: Enterprise analytical services, secure audit logs, and compliance telemetry.
reportingStudio.chartWsDesc: Simulated concurrent stream traffic reporting points in venues.
reportingStudio.chartBillingDesc: Aggregated membership proceeds classified by subscription level.
reportingStudio.chartGenreDesc: Representation of current active catalog segmented by musical genre.
reportingStudio.chartDiurnalDesc: Average hourly play completions reported by remote streaming clients.
reportingStudio.chartLicensingDesc: Percentage configuration breakdown of exempt certificates ledgers.
reportingStudio.refundAlert: Simulated transaction refund parsed successfully. License updated.
reportingStudio.policyText: All media catalog tracks uploaded inside Hardban Records Lab are verified and registered with International Standard Recording Codes (ISRC). Clients playing direct-licensed streams of HRL catalog tracks represent full legal compliance, bypassing the requirements of paying public execution royalties directly to ZAiKS, STOART, and ZPAV licensing societies.
reportingStudio.searchPlaceholder: Query audit trail by keyword details, operator...
reportingStudio.emptyAudit: No corresponding audit events found. Try adapting filters.

securityConsole.heading: Security & Compliance Center (GDPR / OWASP / MFA)
securityConsole.subheading: Authorization, hard headers, abuse blocking and user data sovereignty
securityConsole.mfaInvalidCode: Invalid MFA verification code. Try again.
securityConsole.disableMfaConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable two-step authorization for your account? This will drastically reduce portal security.
securityConsole.errorDisablingMfa: An error occurred while disabling MFA.
securityConsole.gdprExportSuccess: Portable GDPR data file generated successfully.
securityConsole.gdprDeleteAlert: Your data has been deleted. Session will be closed.
securityConsole.owaspSuccess: OWASP Top 10 scanning completed. Analysis and logs successfully archived.
securityConsole.mfaDescription: Secure your admin or client access by requiring one-time cryptographically generated time-based passwords (TOTP RFC 6238). You can use popular applications such as **Google Authenticator**, **Microsoft Authenticator** or **Authy** to register the positioned secret.
securityConsole.mfaActiveDesc: MFA protects your session even in case of data or password leaks.
securityConsole.mfaDisabledStatus: Login currently runs without 2FA protection. Immediate activation recommended.
securityConsole.mfaStep1: Step 1: Scan the key or enter the secret in your TOTP app
securityConsole.timeSettings: Settings: One-time password based on time (Time-based OTP), 30 seconds
securityConsole.mfaStep2: Step 2: Enter the generated 6-digit code to confirm activation
securityConsole.sessionSecurityDesc: CMLP Platform implements strict session limits and cookie encryption in transit.
securityConsole.blocklistTitle: IP Blocking Management and Abuse Analysis
securityConsole.blocklistDesc: Add malicious servers or suspicious IP ranges to the active blocklist. The platform automatically blocks bruteforce attempts or DoS attacks, imposing temporary bans. Manual blocks remain active until the admin removes them.
securityConsole.blocklistEmpty: No active IP blocks. System monitors network traffic.
securityConsole.dosProtectionDesc: Auto-block algorithm suspends requests from clients who perform:
securityConsole.dosRateNote: Automatic bans expire after 15 minutes by default.
securityConsole.gdprDesc: In accordance with the EU data protection regulation (GDPR), each client has statutory rights to data portability (Article 20) and data deletion / the right to be forgotten (Article 17). Below you can test these mechanisms yourself for your account to validate the platform's legal compliance.
securityConsole.consentDesc: The platform monitors statistical cookie consent directly in the browser and does not download or target any external marketing scripts without explicit user consent.
securityConsole.deleteModalBody1: You are initiating the permanent deletion of your profile and erasure of personal details. According to guidelines, your name will be redacted and your email address will be replaced with an anonymous cumulative hash. This action is **irreversible**.
securityConsole.deleteModalBody2: * License agreements and financial transaction records will remain with trusted partners for the period required by Polish tax law, but will be fully disconnected from your physical identity portfolio.
securityConsole.owaspDesc: The scanner triggers automatic control queries to key platform APIs, simulating attack attempts such as SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), privilege isolation checks (BOLA/IDOR), and verification of implemented HTTP security headers.
securityConsole.owaspMetricTriggerDesc: Operational dump log has been securely saved in the audit trail database.
securityConsole.owaspReportHeading: OWASP Top 10 Hardening Proofs Report Structure
